final_chunks.text:
DAILY BULLISH DISCOUNT ARRAYS (ALL BULLISH SCENARIO)

final_chunks.section_title: CONFIRMING PRICE ACTION DURING FAVORABLE MOVEMENT (BEARISH)
final_chunks.text:
CONFIRMING PRICE ACTION DURING FAVORABLE MOVEMENT (BEARISH)
